input.hiring_signal_brief: Cortex AI Labs posted 6 ML engineer roles 21 days ago. $40M Series B closed 90 days ago.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted ML engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Current bench: 5 ML engineers available.
input.prior_thread:
Turn 1 (agent): Referenced Cortex AI ML hiring surge and $40M raise. Offered 5 pre-vetted engineers on 2-week timeline.

Turn 2 (prospect reply): Thanks. We actually just closed 4 offers this week. We are good for now.

dimensions.name: no_generic_acknowledgment
dimensions.description: Agent must NOT use hollow validation phrases.
dimensions.check_value: completely understand|i hear you|that is great news|we understand your concern|congratulations on|i understand completely|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|best-in-class|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: remaining_need_reference
dimensions.description: Prospect filled 4 of 6 roles — 2 still open. Agent should reference remaining headcount or future pipeline.
dimensions.check_value: 2 remaining|still have|two more|remaining roles|pipeline|future need|future hire|next round

dimensions.name: low_pressure_close
dimensions.description: Agent must leave the door open without pressure.
dimensions.check_value: when you are ready|no rush|future|next time|keep in touch|happy to reconnect|bench is available

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge verifies low-pressure handling. Pass = avg >= 4/5.
